scope.goal: Define the Coordinator lane contract for Cento agent work scaling.
acceptance: Coordinator lane documentation exists and covers routing, status hygiene, dispatch guardrails, notification discipline, and escalation.
Agent work documentation links Builder, Validator, Docs/Evidence, and Coordinator lane responsibilities.
The story has a valid story.json and generated manager-facing hub.
Validation commands and evidence paths are recorded in a builder report.

expected_outputs.description: Agent work guide linking the lane contracts

routes.name: Process scaling source
routes.purpose: Original process-scaling report that defined the Coordinator lane need.

notes: Spark dispatch was quota-blocked, so the Coordinator lane deliverable was completed locally from the Mac operator session.
Future automated coordinator workers should use this contract and avoid unbounded dispatch retries.
